MOKOUMOD-ESSENCE.description: Stored in your starting relic. Each [gold]Essence[/gold] increases [gold]Rekindle[/gold] healing by [blue]5%[/blue].
MOKOUMOD-ESSENCE.title: Essence
MOKOUMOD-NONLETHAL.description: Keep [blue]1[/blue] HP if losing such amount would kill you.
MOKOUMOD-NONLETHAL.title: Non-Lethal
MOKOUMOD-IGNITE.description: Triggers if any unit (including yourself) has at least X [gold]Burn[/gold] (highlighted in [gold]gold[/gold] when active).
MOKOUMOD-IGNITE.title: Ignite(X)
MOKOUMOD-FURY.description: Triggers if you have lost HP this turn (highlighted in [red]red[/red] when active).
MOKOUMOD-FURY.title: Fury
MOKOUMOD-EMBER.description: Triggers if you are at or below [blue]50%[/blue] HP or have revived from [gold]Rekindle[/gold] this combat (highlighted in [purple]purple[/purple] when active).
MOKOUMOD-EMBER.title: Ember
MOKOUMOD-FUEL.description: A special type of card with [gold]Unplayable[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold], X indicates its Durability. Whenever a [gold]Fuel[/gold] is in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and you play a card with active [gold]Ignite[/gold], [red]Fury[/red] or [purple]Ember[/purple], trigger [gold]Fuel's[/gold] effect and lose [blue]1[/blue] Durability. A [gold]Fuel[/gold] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold] when its Durability is [blue]0[/blue].
MOKOUMOD-FUEL.title: Fuel(X)
MOKOUMOD-EXHUME.description: Return cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-EXHUME.title: Exhume
